zh.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Helawise de Stuteville於大約1142年出生在英國波藍德時，她的父親Robert de Stuteville IV28歲，母親Helwise de Murdac22歲。她於1170年之前與William de Lancaster II在英國維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1226年享年85歲。

zh-hans.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: 英国波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh-hans.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 英国波藍德波 白 桑德斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helawise de Stuteville于大约1142年出生在英国波藍德时，她的父亲Robert de Stuteville IV28岁，母亲Helwise de Murdac22岁。她于1170年之前与William de Lancaster II在英国維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1226年享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Helawise de Stuteville was born about 1142, in Cumberland, England, her father, Robert de Stuteville IV, was 28 and her mother, Helwise de Murdac, was 22. She married William de Lancaster II before 1170, in Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1226, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helawise de Stuteville est née environ 1142, à Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Stuteville IV, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Helwise de Murdac, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William de Lancaster II avant 1170, à Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1226, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helawise de Stuteville um 1142 in Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Stuteville IV 28 und ihre Mutter Helwise de Murdac 22. Sie hat vor 1170 in Westmorland, England William de Lancaster II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1226 im Alter von 85 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helawise de Stuteville è nata il circa 1142 nel Cumberland, England, sua padre, Robert de Stuteville IV, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Helwise de Murdac, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William de Lancaster II prima del 1170, nel Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1226, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Helawise de Stutevilleが約1142年にイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Robert de Stuteville IVは28歳，母Helwise de Murdacは22歳であった。1170年以前にイギリスウエストモーランドでWilliam de Lancaster IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1226年に85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helawise de Stuteville(이)가 대략 1142년 영국 c벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Stuteville IV(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helwise de Murdac(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1170년 이전 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 William de Lancaster II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1226년 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helawise de Stuteville nasceu aproximadamente 1142, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Stuteville IV, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Helwise de Murdac, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Lancaster II antes 1170, em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1226, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helawise de Stuteville родилась около 1142 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Stuteville IV было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Helwise de Murdac, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Lancaster II перед 1170 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1226 г. в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helawise de Stuteville nació aproximadamente 1142, en Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Stuteville IV, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Helwise de Murdac, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William de Lancaster II antes de 1170, en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1226, a la edad de 85 años.
